output: The 23-year-old younger brother of Sunderland’s Wes Brown had been on trial with Bury (the Shakers). He has also had spells at Bradford, Doncaster, Oldham, Coventry, Ipswich, Watford and Carlisle, making over 50 Football League appearances. He is available for Bury’s League One season opener at Doncaster on Saturday. For more football transfers, see the dedicated page.
